name: job-application-quality
description: CLI-first Codex plugin for reusable multi-tenant job application quality gates, packets, QA, hooks, and multi-CLI agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Quality-first job application workflow with canonical facts and submission gates.
interface.longDescription: Job Application Quality helps Codex prepare role-specific application packets without inventing claims. It validates tenant facts, role evidence, sponsorship and remote-work gates, artifact quality, manifests, and approval requirements before an approved email send or browser final-submit step.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use jobqa to run preflight QA on this application packet before submission.
